items.claim: Max Holloway is more active than Conor McGregor.
items.quote: active. McGregor's not. That's got to favor Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's cardio will fail him as the fight progresses.
items.quote: As McGregor gets tired, he'll move to 28-9 in my opinion.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has a higher significant strike rate than Cody Durden.
items.quote: Costa leads there but just barely. 3.9 significant strikes per minute to 3.2 for Deran.

items.claim: Cody Durden has a superior takedown game compared to Alessandro Costa.
items.quote: the takedown game uh slides to Duran because he lands more than one takedown per round and Costa lands less than a takedown every three rounds.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa's 86% takedown defense will neutralize Cody Durden's wrestling.
items.quote: Costa 86% takedown defense. That'll pay off in this fight.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra has a 100% takedown defense rate in his UFC career.
Ryan Gandra possesses high-level finishing ability in the first round.
items.quote: he's finished both of his opponents in the first round

items.claim: Javid Basharat has a strong takedown game that averages more than one takedown per round.
items.quote: has a strong takedown game landing more than one takedown per round.
